The '''Bothan shrieker''' was a [[Sonic pistol|sonic]]-based hold-out [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] that was popular about four thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. While dangerous to other [[Species/Legends|species]], the weapon did twice the amount of damage to [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] due to their sensitive hearing and large ears. A Bothan hit by a blast was more likely to be incapacitated for some time by the weapon.

{{Weapon-stub}}
